session.user: Run these commands and report results. Do not fix any errors. 1. `uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/land_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py tests/commands/land/test_up_flag.py` 2. `uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/land_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py tests/commands/land/test_up_flag.py` 3. `uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/land_pipeline.py`
session.assistant: I'll execute these commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/land_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py tests/commands/land/test_up_flag.py
Run ruff linting check on specified files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/land_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py tests/commands/land/test_up_flag.py
Run ruff format check on specified files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ty type checker on land_pipeline.py

session.assistant:
All tools passed successfully:
1. **ruff check** passed: All checks passed on the three files 2. **ruff format --check** passed: Files are already properly formatted (3 files already formatted) 3. **ty check** passed: All type checks passed for land_pipeline.py
No issues found in the specified files.
